query: SELECT * FROM industry_reports WHERE industry LIKE '%Manuka%' OR industry LIKE '%麦卢卡%' OR industry LIKE '%蜂蜜%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2EAZY856c5gnGPj.root --database nFR2dhbajjs79BCzAWVDNL --execute SELECT * FROM industry_reports WHERE industry LIKE '%Manuka%' OR industry LIKE '%麦卢卡%' OR industry LIKE '%蜂蜜%' LIMIT 10;

rows.title: Manuka Honey Market Size, Share | Industry Demand [2032]
rows.insight: Global market valued at USD 408.54M in 2024, projected to reach USD 597.52M by 2032 at 4.94% CAGR. Europe dominates with 35% market share. Key players: Comvita, Manuka Health, Watson & Son.
rows.relevance: Comprehensive market analysis with size, share, trends, competitive landscape, and regional forecasts

rows.title: Manuka Honey Market Size, Share & Trends Report 2033
rows.insight: Market valued at USD 754.83M in 2024, projected to reach USD 1,230.51M by 2033 at 5.30% CAGR. Asia-Pacific dominates with 30.3% share. UMF15+ segment holds 35.2% market share.
rows.relevance: Detailed segmentation by type (UMF grades), nature, distribution channel with regional analysis

rows.title: Manuka Honey Market Analysis, Size, and Forecast 2025-2029
rows.insight: Market to grow by USD 441.2M at 6.1% CAGR from 2024-2029. Key drivers: rising demand for natural health products, expanding use in cosmetics and pharmaceuticals.
rows.relevance: Market growth factors, trends analysis, and competitive landscape assessment

rows.title: Manuka Honey Market Set to Generate $776.4 Million by 2031
rows.insight: Market valued at USD 455.4M in 2021, projected to reach USD 776.4M by 2031 at 5.5% CAGR. Key segments: UMF 5+, UMF 10+, UMF 15+, UMF 20+.
rows.relevance: Long-term market forecast with detailed segmentation and growth analysis

rows.title: NZ Honey Strategy 2024-2030 (Thriving Together)
rows.insight: Official NZ industry strategy. Mānuka honey market opportunity forecast to grow at 7.8% to $1.6B by 2028. Covers export trends, quality standards, and industry challenges.
rows.relevance: Primary source from official New Zealand honey industry body with strategic outlook

rows.title: 2024-2030年全球与中国麦卢卡蜂蜜市场调查与市场分析
rows.insight: Chinese market analysis covering global and China Manuka honey market trends, competitive landscape, and development forecasts through 2030.
rows.relevance: Chinese language report with focus on China market dynamics and import trends

rows.title: 全球与中国麦卢卡蜂蜜行业市场调查研究及发展前景预测报告（2022年版）
rows.url: https://pdfs.cir.cn/YiYaoBaoJian/18/麦卢卡蜂蜜行业现状与发展前景_1965718.pdf
rows.insight: Comprehensive analysis of global and China Manuka honey market including market demand, scale analysis, and development prospects.
rows.relevance: Chinese research institution report with market size and competitive analysis

rows.title: 海纳集成第二十期新西兰麦卢卡蜂蜜（Mānuka Honey）产业分析
rows.insight: Government report on NZ Manuka honey industry covering MGO and UMF certification standards, medical applications, and market positioning.
rows.relevance: Official government analysis with focus on quality standards and medical applications
